overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game (Starfield) showing a character in spacesuit armor walking through a futuristic industrial space station. The character progresses from narrow metal corridors through machinery-filled rooms into a large, populated common area with kitchen facilities and dining spaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with metal walls and overhead lighting

events.description: approaching automatic doorway marked 438 leading to larger industrial area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a narrow metal corridor in a spacesuit, passing a child NPC and approaching a seated worker

notable_agents.action: child in pink jacket standing against the wall at the start of the corridor
worker in orange vest sitting on a crate near the doorway at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: dark metallic walls with industrial panels and piping running along the sides
bright linear overhead lights illuminating the corridor
automatic sliding door with the number 438 displayed above it
wall-mounted ventilation panel with metal grating
orange and black safety poster on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed metal corridor with industrial walls and bright overhead lighting. A child stands against the left wall initially, and a worker sits on a crate near doorway 438 at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial machinery room with large pipes and equipment

events.description: exits narrow corridor into larger industrial room with visible machinery and piping
character turns slightly left to navigate around large machinery units
crowd density increases as character approaches entrance to common area

agents.ego_description: navigating through the industrial area, walking past machinery and other workers

notable_agents.action: person in white outfit standing near the large industrial machinery
person walking across the path from right to left

entered.detail: massive vertical industrial pipes running from floor to ceiling
complex mechanical equipment with glowing elements and metal housings
stacked metal crates and storage containers
large doorway leading to a brightly lit common area with people visible inside

segments.scene_description: The character enters a larger industrial room featuring massive vertical pipes and complex machinery. The space is populated with several NPCs walking about, and the character navigates around equipment while approaching a doorway leading to a busy common area.

scene_state.functional_zone: large common area with seating, kitchen facilities, and social gathering space

events.description: enters large open common area from industrial corridor, space opens up significantly
character turns toward the right to approach the kitchen station area
approaches active commercial kitchen station with visible cooking equipment

agents.ego_description: exploring the busy common area, walking past dining tables and groups of people, approaching a kitchen station

notable_agents.action: chef in green apron working at the commercial kitchen station
group of three people standing and conversing near the center of the room

entered.detail: white and blue plastic chairs scattered around dining tables
rectangular metal dining tables with white surfaces
stainless steel kitchen counter with cooking equipment, pots, and utensils
large circular metal floor grates with mesh patterns
large structural support columns rising to the high ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious common area filled with NPCs, plastic chairs, and metal tables. The environment features industrial pillars, circular floor grates, and a commercial kitchen station where a chef works. The character explores the area, moving past groups of conversing people and approaching the kitchen facilities on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined industrial corridor into a sprawling, populated common area. It begins by following a character through a narrow metal hallway with bright overhead lighting, passing a child against the wall and a worker resting near a doorway. As the character moves forward, the space opens into a larger industrial room dominated by massive vertical pipes and complex machinery where several NPCs navigate the equipment. The scene then expands further as the character passes through another doorway into a spacious hub filled with metal tables, plastic chairs, and circular floor grates. Finally, the camera glides past groups of conversing people toward a commercial kitchen station on the right where a chef is at work.
